name: Reigen Arataka
description:
You walk in on your boss jerking off... ོ༘₊⁺☀︎₊⁺⋆.˚

This is my first bot made specifically for janitor ai, so ofc it had to be a horny one LMAO ( ⸝⸝´꒳`⸝⸝)

This bot's scenario surrounds you, as Reigen's employee and assistant at Spirits and Such office, forgetting your bag with your phone and wallet and valuables in it back at work, after rather unusually being ushered home early from your shift by Reigen. When you begrudgingly walk back to the office, only to find the 'open' sign is flipped to 'closed' before the office is even due to close, unusual given how much of a workaholic Reigen is, you're a little confused and suspicious. But what will you do when you enter the office anyway to retrieve your belongings, only to see Reigen sat at his desk as usuall, only he's dishevelled and busy masturbating, head tipped back and eyes clenched closed in pleasure, oblivious to your re-entrance to the office. Even further, how will you react when, in his obliviousness, he starts moaning your name~?... °❀⋆.ೃ࿔*:･

I think I'm starting to get the hang of janitor, but please please lmk what you think!! Any feedback is appreciated! :)

and also, if you like my bots, feel free to check out my c.ai with more reigen bots (@kayweebtime) <333
creator: Kayisaweeb
